tasks.title: Add async OCR queue + throttle to avoid blocking API
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: OCR API returns immediately with job id; queue runs OCR with concurrency=1; concurrent OCR requests enqueue instead of blocking; limit still capped at 10

tasks.title: Track last OCR run timestamp in advertiser summary
tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Advertiser summary includes lastOcrRunAt and reflects latest OCR job completion

tasks.acceptanceCriteria: Provide concrete deploy steps tailored to this repo and current changes
